title: Dungeon Levers
description: Changes Levers to show their hitbox and be more visible for something like dungeons for QOL (Quality Of Life)
body:
Levers for Dungeoneering!

With this pack u will be able to clearly tell where the hitbox stops and starts based of the lever. Not only that but u can see if the lever is on or off by the bounding boxes color! And the textures are animated giving themselves even more attention! **Continuity adds support for transparent and emissive textures making it look alot nicer! (optifine standards)**
